calendar.matters:
MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar May-06-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Sunny Lee, Esq. 714-451-7726 Lanak & Hanna for Plaintiff.
Richard Asfar, Esq. 813-227-5512 Adams & Reese LLP for Defendant.

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received.

ARGUED.
Ms. Lee contests and presents arguments; cites exhibit 1 and 4 on the declaration, 3 separtae invoices,span of 10 months, products purchased and shipped, $200,000 worth of products took 10 months; cites Rocklin de Mexico case, number of transactions not dispositive
Court comments and poses questions, what's the best case for personal jurisdiction.
Mr. Asfar responds to Plaintiff's arguments; requests to adopt the TR.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Defendant Legacy Restoration, LLC's motion to quash.

Taken Under Submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
